symbols: mother holding child — the universal theme of maternal love and protection
fragmented geometric forms — the multifaceted nature of human relationships
description: An abstract cubist-style painting depicting a seated figure holding a smaller figure, interpreted as a mother and child. The forms are broken into angular geometric shapes outlined in dark lines, filled with warm tones of pink, mauve, ochre, tan, and teal. The mother figure faces left in profile with her arms around the child. The background is composed of the same geometric fragmentation in deeper pinks and purples. The overall effect is warm and intimate despite the abstraction.
